title: Fluid Boundaries
description: A group exhibition exploring the intersection of traditional Moroccan craftsmanship and contemporary digital art. Features works by Amina Al-Fassi, Leila Chraibi, and three international guest artists.

title: Concrete Gardens: A Retrospective
description: The first comprehensive retrospective of Youssef Benali's photography, spanning a decade of documenting Morocco's urban transformation.

title: Asilah International Moussem
description: The annual cultural festival transforms Asilah into a living gallery with mural painting, concerts, poetry readings, and exhibitions throughout the medina.

title: Emerging Voices: New Moroccan Art
description: A showcase of twelve emerging Moroccan artists working across painting, sculpture, video, and installation art.

title: Masterclass: Ceramic Techniques
description: A three-day intensive workshop led by Leila Chraibi, exploring traditional zellij techniques and contemporary applications.

title: The Asilah Murals: 40 Years
description: A photographic journey through four decades of Asilah's famous mural festival, featuring images from 50 international artists who have painted the city's walls.
